channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: oblien/openship
item.description: Self-hosted deployment platform

item.title: anomalyco/browser-control
item.description: Local browser driver for trusted agents: control your existing Chromium browser through a small extension and local relay

item.title: hoainho/img2threejs
item.description: Rebuild the object in a reference image as a code-only, procedural, quality-gated, animation-ready Three.js model. Token-efficient image-to-3D.

item.title: isene/frame
item.description: Pure-asm X11 display server for the CHasm desktop. No libc, no Mesa, no Xlib — just NASM, syscalls, and the X11 wire protocol.

item.title: SirAllap/agentglass
item.description: 🛰 A loupe for your agents — a real-time Mission-Control dashboard and workspace for AI coding agents, across every provider and every project on your machine

item.title: lopopolo/harness-engineering
item.description: 🐎 Ryan Lopopolo’s anthology, field guide, and agent context bundle for harness engineering

item.title: pablostanley/yoinks
item.description: yoink any video from your terminal. no shady ads.

item.title: tokio-rs/topcoat
item.description: A batteries-included framework for building web apps

item.title: erickong/penecho
item.description: Think with AI beyond the chat box. A shared canvas for handwriting, equations, diagrams, and spatial reasoning.

item.title: Icex0/wp2shell-poc
item.description: wp2shell (CVE-2026-63030 & CVE-2026-60137) - full RCE chain

item.title: katipally/openlive
item.description: Live voice + vision AI assistant — on-device voice pipeline, thin LLM proxy

item.title: xiejunjie524/handdraw-story-video
item.description: Turn hand-drawn story illustrations into 35–45 second line-reveal and gradual-coloring videos with HyperFrames.

item.title: yaojingang/GEORank
item.description: Open-source GEO ranking and generative engine optimization platform.

item.title: KytyPS5/KytyPS5
item.description: PlayStation 5 emulator for Windows

item.title: Fei-Away/Codex-Dream-Skin
item.description: Codex Dream Skin

item.title: KnockOutEZ/wigolo
item.description: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.

item.title: microsoft/comic-chat
item.description: Source code for the Microsoft Comic Chat IRC client

item.title: tandpfun/wardrobe
item.description: Your clothes, extracted and organized with gpt-image.

item.title: stackblitz/bolt-slides
item.description: Use any agent to create stunning, interactive presentations

item.title: Skyvern-AI/rustwright
item.description: Playwright's API on a Rust CDP engine — Chromium browser automation for Python & Node, no driver subprocess. (Alpha)

item.title: tldraw/tldraw-offline
item.description: A desktop app for using tldraw with local files.

item.title: shibco/ableton-linux
item.description: Run Ableton 12 and Push on Linux

item.title: vshulcz/deja-vu
item.description: Memory layer for coding agents: search, MCP recall, auto-context, secret redaction, stats, share and sync over the session logs Claude Code, Codex and opencode already write. One zero-dep binary.

item.title: oversecured/Samsung_Vulnerabilities
item.description: 176 vulnerabilities in Samsung preinstalled Android apps

item.title: xai-org/grok-build
item.description: SpaceXAI's coding agent harness and TUI. Fullscreen, mouse interactive, extensible.

item.title: pixel-point/aval
item.description: A new open-source format for interactive video on the web, with a built-in state machine, frame-accurate transitions, and packed-alpha transparency.

item.title: kitlangton/skills
item.description: Here are some skills I use. Maybe you'll find them useful. Maybe not. Goodbye.

item.title: Stack-Cairn/LiveAgent
item.description: A fully functional AI Agent desktop client that supports Webui access and can be creatively customized and expanded!

item.title: oil-oil/beautify-github-readme
item.description: Design clear, theme-specific GitHub README homepages with SVG titles, real proof, and maintainable Markdown

item.title: sharpemu/sharpemu
item.description: An experimental PlayStation 5 emulator for Windows, Linux and macOS.

item.title: TobiasLee/Rebuttal-Skill
item.description: (no description)

item.title: iptvorganization/TV-AutoBuild
item.description: Monitored public GitHub Actions builds for iptvorganization TV Mobile and Leanback APKs

item.title: MatinSenPai/Aether-GUI
item.description: One-click desktop GUI for the Aether censorship-circumvention tunnel — Tauri v2, React 19, Rust

item.title: composio-community/awesome-codex-skills
item.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.

item.title: deer-flow/llm-space
item.description: A desktop app to prototype agent ideas, inspect every harness step, replay failures, and evaluate performance, all in one place. Local-first.

item.title: haydenbleasel/blume
item.description: World-class docs for everything you ship. Fast, AI-ready, and zero-config.

item.title: juggler-ai/juggler
item.description: The Juggler Code Agent

item.title: NVIDIA-NeMo/labs-molt
item.description: (no description)

item.title: nv-tlabs/ardy
item.description: Official implementation of ARDY: Autoregressive Diffusion with Hybrid Representation for Interactive Human Motion Generation (SIGGRAPH 2026).

item.title: clawkwork/clawk
item.description: Disposable, network-restricted Linux VMs for AI coding agents

item.title: team-reflect/reflect-open
item.description: Open-source Reflect rewrite

item.title: yellow-key/yellowkey-bitlocker
item.description: yellow key bitlocker yellow screen bitlocker bitlocker recovery key CVE-2026-45585 microsoft account secure boot bypass command prompt windows 11 windows 10 surface pro uefi firmware encryption key data recovery troubleshoot boot loop cmd unlock drive setup guide tutorial

item.title: ryujinx-emu/Ryujinx-Emu
item.description: ryujinx emulator nintendo switch emulation pc gaming open source github repository download link fork ryubing vulkan api opengl renderer shader cache graphics mods ldn multiplayer local wireless save manager firmware setup configuration guide controller mapping steam deck linux windows 11 desktop applicatio

item.title: millennium-steam/Millennium-Steam
item.description: steam millennium steambrew steam skins client modification open source github repository download link custom themes plugins framework css injection javascript patcher user interface customization user experience windows 11 windows 10 linux steam deck setup configuration guide installation tutorial troubleshooting desktop utility gaming

item.title: ImageLine-Project/fl-25.2.5
item.description: fl 25.2.5 image line daw digital audio workstation music production beat making vst plugins audio editing mixing mastering piano roll step sequencer audio interface asio4all producer edition desktop utility installation setup guide beginner tutorial workflow optimization

item.title: CluvexStudio/Aether
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Retro-Diffusion/pixel-art-fixer
item.description: Convert images into pixel art

item.title: littledivy/mimic
item.description: Intercept any app, then call it from Python like a library

item.title: ronak-create/FableCut
item.description: Zero-dependency browser video editor that AI agents can drive — JSON timeline, MCP + REST, live-reloading UI

item.title: Kappaemme-git/codex-first-customer-finder-skill
item.description: A Codex skill that finds evidence-backed potential first customers from recent public signals.

item.title: aws-samples/sample-specship
item.description: Spec-driven autonomous engineering workflow for AI coding agents: recon → plan → build → validate → ship — with TDD, adversarial validation, and anti-slop quality gates. Packaged as a Kiro Power.

item.title: chuspeeism/dashi-ppt-skill
item.description: An AI-agent skill that generates browser-editable presentations from multiple visual themes, exportable to HTML, PDF, and PPTX.
